# UC-22.54.17 · CIRCIA Interim Voluntary-Reporting Posture — documented decision-and-implementation framework for pre-Final-Rule reporting

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance, Governance &middot; **Wave:** Walk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*Until the cyber agency makes the rule final, reporting is voluntary. We still must decide — in writing — whether we will file. The CISO and head lawyer sign that decision and review it every year.*

---

## Description

Tracks the entity's documented voluntary-reporting decision and annual-review cadence for the pre-Final-Rule interim period.

## Value

An undocumented voluntary-reporting decision creates regulatory exposure if a covered incident occurs during the interim window and the entity has no record of its decision. This UC ensures a documented, signed, periodically-reviewed posture.

## Implementation

(1) The CISO and General Counsel sign the annual voluntary-reporting decision. (2) A SOAR `circia-interim-posture-intake` playbook normalises the decision to the lookup. (3) Schedule UC-22.54.17 weekly Monday 03:00. (4) The decision document is stored in the document store; the lookup pins its location.

## Evidence

Saved search `UC-22.54.17` archived weekly to `audit_evidence` with `circia_clause="CIRCIA-CISA-interim-reporting"`. Every row pins (decision_id, decision_made_at, decision_signed_by, voluntary_reporting_posture, posture_review_due_at, decision_status). Dashboard `CIRCIA — Voluntary-Reporting Posture` shows the executive-signed decision and the upcoming review.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Delete the latest signed decision document from `circia_interim_decision_lookup`. UC-22.54.17 MUST flag the absence with `decision_status="no_active_decision"` within 7 days.

### Negative scenario

Insert a current-FY signed decision with `decision_signed_by=CISO`, `voluntary_reporting_posture="file-on-incident-classification"`, and `posture_review_due_at=+12 months`. UC-22.54.17 MUST record `decision_status="active"`.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- Splunk Enterprise ≥9.2 or Splunk Cloud.
- KV Store `circia_interim_decision_lookup`.

## Step 1 — Define the decision collection

```ini
[circia_interim_decision_lookup]
enforceTypes = true
field.decision_id = string
field.decision_made_at = number
field.decision_signed_by = string
field.voluntary_reporting_posture = string
field.posture_review_due_at = number
field.signed_doc_url = string
```

## Step 2 — Search and alert

```ini
[UC-22.54.17: CIRCIA Voluntary-Reporting Posture]
cron_schedule = 0 3 * * 1
dispatch.earliest_time = -2y@y
dispatch.latest_time = now
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.54.17,reg=CIRCIA,clause=CIRCIA-CISA-interim-reporting
action.notable.param.rule_title = CIRCIA voluntary-reporting decision missing or stale
action.notable.param.security_domain = audit
action.notable.param.severity = medium
alert.severity = 3
```

## Step 3 — Validate deployment

**(a) Decision-missing test**: clear `decision_signed_by`; UC-22.54.17 must alert.

**(b) Active-decision test**: signed, in-window, future-review; UC-22.54.17 must record `active`.

## Step 4 — Operationalize

**Runbook for `no_active_decision` or `decision_stale`** (owner: CISO, severity P3):

1. Within 30 days: CISO + General Counsel co-sign new decision; document.

## Step 5 — Troubleshooting

**Decision transition with Final Rule** — when the CIRCIA Final Rule effective date arrives, UC-22.54.17 retires; handover to UC-22.54.2 and the broader statutory framework.

## SPL

```spl
| inputlookup circia_interim_decision_lookup
| eval now_ts = now()
| eval decision_status = case(
    isnull(decision_made_at) OR isnull(decision_signed_by), "no_active_decision",
    decision_made_at < (now_ts - 13 * 30 * 86400), "decision_stale",
    posture_review_due_at < now_ts, "review_overdue",
    1=1, "active")
| where decision_status != "active"
| table decision_id decision_made_at decision_signed_by voluntary_reporting_posture posture_review_due_at decision_status
```

## Visualization

(Panel 1) Current decision summary. (Panel 2) Decision-history timeline. (Panel 3) Review-due calendar.

## Known False Positives

1. **Decision under revision** — a draft revision may exist while the prior decision is still in force. Suppression: keep the prior decision as `active` until the new decision is signed.

2. **Inactive entity** — a divested subsidiary may not need a decision. Suppression: mark the entity inactive in `circia_entity_register_lookup` (UC-22.54.1) and exclude.

**Suppression mechanism**: KV Store `circia_22_54_17_exceptions` with per-entity grants requiring documented CISO approval and a 90-day maximum grant.

## References

- [CISA — Voluntary Reporting Guidance](https://www.cisa.gov/topics/cyber-threats-and-advisories/information-sharing)
- [CIRCIA Final Rule Timeline](https://www.cisa.gov/topics/cyber-threats-and-advisories/information-sharing/cyber-incident-reporting-critical-infrastructure-act-2022-circia)
